revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on

Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Talk header templates]] to [[Template:Talk page header templates]]: I guess I am immediately moving more things than I thought with this template. But hope this goes well. My bot uses a different named header template so we are using it
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
